query:
INSERT INTO agents (
  ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, capabilities,
  endpointUrl, averageLatency, pricingModel, status,
  connectionTested, domain, isBuiltIn, isCustom, version
) VALUES (
  1,
  'Bakalaria WhatsApp Order Agent',
  'Bakalaria',
  'AI-powered WhatsApp order extraction agent. Connects to WhatsApp groups, monitors messages and screenshots using OCR + AI, and delivers structured order data (Order IDs, items, quantities, units) as daily Excel reports. GCC-native, supports Arabic and English.',
  '["whatsapp_monitoring","order_extraction","ocr","arabic_nlp","excel_export","group_monitoring","screenshot_analysis"]',
  'https://bakalaria-pj6tba6s.manus.space',
  800,
  'free',
  'active',
  false,
  'Enterprise',
  false,
  false,
  '1.0.0'
);
